heading: Records and inspection
label: 150510 Records and inspection
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15051036:413., .Apr. 3, 1952, ch. 131, § 1366 Stat. 40The word “records” is substituted for “books and records” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)15051036:413., .Apr. 3, 1952, ch. 131, § 1366 Stat. 40The word “records” is substituted for “books and records” for consistency in the revised title and with other titles of the United States Code.

children.text: correct and complete records of account;
minutes of the proceedings of its members, board of representatives, and committees having any of the authority of its board of representatives; and
at its principal office, a record of the names and addresses of its members entitled to vote.

children.heading: .—Inspection
children.label: b .—Inspection
children.text: A member entitled to vote, or an agent or attorney of the member, may inspect the records of the corporation for any proper purpose, at any reasonable time.
